synopsis:
"Academy Cadets" is a comic strip written by Martin Fisher, drawn by Eva Widermann and edited by Gunther Nickel. The story was published in the eighteenth issue of the Star Wars Rebels Magazine series by Egmont UK Ltd, which was released on May 18, 2016.
According to Fisher, the story takes place between the Star Wars Rebels episodes "Legends of the Lasat" and "The Call."
title: Academy Cadets
